articles.headline: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Does Christian Pulisic need to improve his form before the World Cup?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss Christian Pulisic's form leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Does Christian Pulisic need to improve his form before the World Cup?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss Christian Pulisic's form leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Do USMNT have a problem vs. European teams?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss the USMNT's form going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Do USMNT have a problem vs. European teams?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss the USMNT's form going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
articles.description: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

images.name: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
images.caption: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

articles.headline: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
articles.description: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

images.name: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
images.caption: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

articles.headline: How USMNT, USWNT choose opponents, venues and prices for games
articles.description: USMNT and USWNT fans often complain about high ticket prices, repetitive cities and weak opponents for games, but U.S. Soccer explains everything that goes into such decisions.

images.name: USWNT walks the field at SoFi Stadium April5-2025 [1296x729]
images.credit: Brad Smith/ISI Photos/Getty Images for USSF

images.name: Who should be the starting striker for the USMNT?
images.caption: Herc Gomez and Shaka Hislop discuss the USMNT attacking options as Agyemang, Balogun and Wright all battle to start.

keyEvents.text: Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Jameel Ible replaces Ethan Bristow because of an injury.
First Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Saint Lucia 0.
Jameel Ible (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Gerard Williams (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kimaree Rogers replaces Ronaldo Belgrove.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Tiquanny Williams replaces Tyrese Shade.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Shervon Malik St. Prix replaces Ridel Stanislas.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Jevick MacFarlane replaces Andrus Remy.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Leaus Henville replaces Jason Similien.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Harry Panayiotou replaces Ezrick Nicholls because of an injury.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Diego Edwards replaces Romaine Sawyers.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Canius Sandiford replaces Lester Joseph because of an injury.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.

play.text: First Half begins.

commentary.text: Attempt missed. Ronaldo Belgrove (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Romaine Sawyers.

play.text: Attempt missed. Ronaldo Belgrove (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Romaine Sawyers.

commentary.text: Offside, St. Kitts And Nevis. Romaine Sawyers tries a through ball, but Tyrese Shade is caught offside.

play.text: Offside, St. Kitts And Nevis. Romaine Sawyers tries a through ball, but Tyrese Shade is caught offside.

commentary.text: Attempt saved. Tyrese Shade (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner. Assisted by Romaine Sawyers.

play.text: Attempt saved. Tyrese Shade (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner. Assisted by Romaine Sawyers.

commentary.text: Foul by Ridel Stanislas (Saint Lucia).

play.text: Raheem Somersall (St. Kitts And Nevis) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

commentary.text: Raheem Somersall (St. Kitts And Nevis) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

play.text: Raheem Somersall (St. Kitts And Nevis) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

commentary.text: Attempt missed. Ronaldo Belgrove (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Omari Sterling-James.

play.text: Attempt missed. Ronaldo Belgrove (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Omari Sterling-James.

commentary.text: Delay in match  because of an injury Ethan Bristow (St. Kitts And Nevis).
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Jameel Ible replaces Ethan Bristow because of an injury.

play.text: Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Jameel Ible replaces Ethan Bristow because of an injury.

commentary.text: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
